name: coze_tool_field_mapping
description: Mapping from user-facing Coze concepts to backend API fields.

api_fields.source_relative_path: relative path to metadata CSV, TSV, or TXT
relative path to count matrix CSV, TSV, or TXT

api_fields.contrast_column: metadata column containing the compared groups
api_fields.group_column: same user-facing metadata column for planning context

mappings.notes: Current MVP supports condition as the primary contrast column.

api_fields.contrast_numerator: group expected to be positive when expression is higher

mappings.notes: Positive log2FC means higher in this group relative to the denominator.
Negative log2FC means lower in the numerator relative to this group.

api_fields.formal_de_method: deseq2 only when formal DESeq2 is requested
